  1. io.github.igorgf.control

Uses of Package
io.github.igorgf.control

Packages that use io.github.igorgf.control
Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.
  • Classes in io.github.igorgf.control used by io.github.igorgf.control
    Class
    Description
    Either
    A disjoint union (sum type) representing exactly one of two possible outcomes: Left<L> or Right<R>.
    EmptyValueException
     
    Option
    A sum type representing the presence or absence of a value, as a null-safe alternative to Optional.
    Thrown
     
    Try
     
    Try.TryBiFunctionStep
     
    Try.TryFunctionStep
     
    TryWithResources
     
    TryWithResources.TryBiFunctionWithResourcesStep
     
    TryWithResources.TryFunctionWithResourceStep
     
    Validation
    A disjoint union (sum type) representing a validated value Valid<T> or an accumulated List<E> of errors contained by Invalid<E>.
    ValidationBuilder
